description: A man wearing a red shirt with a picture on it, a pair of black pants and a pair of gray shoes.
The man has short black hair. He is wearing a red shirt, black pants, and black shoes.
The man is wearing a blue and black short sleeved shirt and black pants with white sneakers as he walks along the street.
A man is wearing a blue and black striped shirt with a white collar, white sneakers and a backpack.
